title: Dynamic bit write with signed expression fails
body:
Minimised from an example by @smunaut 

```verilog
module top(input [7:0] wr_mask, output reg [7:0] mem_dm_w);

	localparam DATA_WIDTH = 32;
	localparam MASK_WIDTH = 8;
	localparam NW = 2;

	always @(*)
	begin : map
		integer n, x, o;

		// Map actual bits
		for (n=0; n<MASK_WIDTH; n=n+1)
		begin
			// Determine position
			x = n % NW;	// Which SPRAM
			o = n / NW;	// Which nibble inside that SPRAM

			// Map IO
			mem_dm_w[( 4*x)+   o    ] = ~wr_mask[n];
		end
	end
endmodule
```
gives
```
ERROR: Found error in internal cell \top.$shl$signed_bitsel.v:0$134 ($shl) at kernel/rtlil.cc:850:
  attribute \src "signed_bitsel.v:0"
  cell $shl $shl$signed_bitsel.v:0$134
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 8
    parameter \B_WIDTH 32
    parameter \A_WIDTH 8
    parameter \B_SIGNED 1
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y $shl$signed_bitsel.v:0$134_Y
    connect \B $add$signed_bitsel.v:19$133_Y
    connect \A $and$signed_bitsel.v:0$131_Y
  end
```

This appears to be a regression caused by #1851, reverting the merge commit causes it to build fine.
code_blocks:

  attribute \src "signed_bitsel.v:0"
  cell $shl $shl$signed_bitsel.v:0$134
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 8
    parameter \B_WIDTH 32
    parameter \A_WIDTH 8
    parameter \B_SIGNED 1
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y $shl$signed_bitsel.v:0$134_Y
    connect \B $add$signed_bitsel.v:19$133_Y
    connect \A $and$signed_bitsel.v:0$131_Y
  end
